Get Started
For property managers & landlords

Hotel-style cleaning now in your building.

Zing adds a dedicated cleaner to your building, delivering hotel-style, à la carte service for residents — without adding cost, time, or complexity for your team.

Add Zing to Your Building
Why Zing Works

A premium, hotel-level amenity your residents will love.

01

Housekeeping built for how residents actually live

Zing provides on-demand, à la carte cleaning for every need — whether it's making the bed, cleaning just the bathrooms, or a full recurring clean. No task is too small, and help is always just a tap away.

02

A trusted face in your building, every day

Your residents see the same Zing professional every day — no rotating contractors. With someone on-site full-time, requests are handled fast and by a familiar face residents trust.

03

Elevate your building for free

Because Zing places a dedicated cleaner on-site, residents get trusted, hotel-quality housekeeping at affordable prices they can't find anywhere else — all without adding cost or work for your team.

How It Works

Up and running in 15 days.

1
🤝

Schedule a free walk-through

Book a 45-minute walk-through of your property at a time that works for you. No pressure, no card required.

2
🏢

We handle all setup & activation

Zing manages staffing, onboarding, and a resident launch event. Buildings typically see 20–30% resident sign-ups in week one.

3
⚡

Residents book on-demand

Residents book via the app — from single tasks to full cleans, same-day. Your team doesn't lift a finger.

For Residents

Cleaning that fits around their life, not the other way around.

⚡
On-Demand

Book in seconds

From single tasks to full apartment cleans — schedule when you want it, even same-day.

🔄
Schedule

Automatic routines

Bathroom cleans twice a month or dishes every night — set recurring routines that fit life perfectly.

✨
Custom

Your package, your way

Choose from curated packages or build your own custom task list, then set the exact cadence that works for you.

For Property Managers

Why property managers love Zing.

Zing keeps your residents happy, your building running smoothly, and your staff free from extra work.

01
🔑

Turnkey solution

The easiest amenity you'll ever launch. We handle staffing, onboarding, setup, and operations from day one.

02
❤️

Resident satisfaction

70% of residents say it's a top reason they enjoy living in the building. A trusted, everyday service that improves retention.

03
🛡️

Zero effort from staff

Zing is fully managed and fully insured. We handle all scheduling, service delivery, reporting, and customer support.

04
$

No cost to the building

Zing is a no-cost resident amenity. We monetize directly through resident task bookings — never through the building.

Building Activation

The Zing Resident Breakfast.

We kick things off with a complimentary, community-building event — coffee, pastries, and good conversation. Residents meet their dedicated cleaner and discover the convenience of Zing.

Host a Free Zing Breakfast
Step 1

Free Building Event

We host a resident event to introduce Zing and drive sign-ups.

FAQs

Everything you need to know.

No. Zing is a no-cost resident amenity. We monetize directly through resident task bookings — the building and management company pay nothing.
We provide a light, turnkey activation — typically a resident breakfast or lobby pop-up. Within one week, buildings usually see 20–30% resident sign-ups.
Everything from light household tasks (trash removal, dishes, plant watering) to full apartment cleans, recurring services, and special housekeeping requests.
Access is fully flexible — residents select their preferred method when booking. All Zing team members undergo comprehensive background checks, receive professional training, and are fully insured. Because Zing assigns a dedicated cleaner to each building, residents quickly become familiar with the same trusted professional every day.
We resolve issues same-day. Residents contact us directly — not your team. We guarantee re-cleans, fixes, or refunds as needed.
Residents sign up during our launch breakfast by scanning a QR code — takes under 20 seconds. After that, most begin booking small tasks within the first week as they see the Zing cleaner in the building daily.
